mapper.select: select distinct m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_path, m.icon, m.sort_no, m.visible from sys_menu m inner join sys_role_menu rm on rm.menu_id = m.id inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rm.role_id inner join sys_role r on r.id = rm.role_id and r.enabled = 1 where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.visible = 1 order by m.parent_id, m.sort_no, m.id
